assure1 Trust Mark; run1 operates it → then expand.

svg.text: ① Composed + custom — manufacture1 deploys supply1 and builds bespoke shop-floor / OT-adjacent agents with agent1, operated by run1.
② Humans control the machines — agents advise & recommend; operators act. No autonomous control of equipment or the line.
③ Safety-first & OT-separated — advisory only on the OT side; safety-critical actions always human; EHS-aligned.
④ Grounded & traceable — recommendations tie to real plant data; full lot / batch / serial traceability; immutable audit.
⑤ Reliable & protected — run1 keeps plant uptime & quality in check; process IP protected; India residency.
⑥ Outcome-led — OEE, downtime, scrap, cost & safety, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
